name: Mendenhall Sourdough Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the brown sugar and shortening together until smooth.
2. Beat in the molasses and egg, mixing continuously.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, ginger, salt, baking soda) into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually blend the sifted dry ingredients with hot water.
5. Carefully beat this mixture into the creamed mixture until well combined.
6. Slowly add the sourdough starter to the batter, mixing gently to maintain bubbles.
7. Pour the batter into a greased pan and bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for about 30 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Serve hot with ice cream or whipped cream if possible.
